description: React Native / Expo projects. Extends mobile/_base.json for auth0 (opt-in) - straddles both frontend and mobile.

plugins.description: Official Expo plugin - Expo Skills + MCP server (EAS logs, docs, deploy). Free; auto-enabled since Expo is the documented default workflow for new React Native projects.

_notes: Bare (non-Expo) project: expo@claude-plugins-official is harmless but won't do much - disable via /init-stack's selector if not using Expo/EAS.
